description.content: Real-time and historical stock market price data
Get real-time prices for US-listed stocks, updated from trade reports from IEX. Includes pre and post market data.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
(Required) Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols (e.g., AAPL,MSFT,TSLA).
Include pre/post market extended hours data.
Key response data by ticker symbol instead of array index.

description.content: Get historical intraday data adjusted for splits, spanning 7+ years. Returns OHLCV data at minute or hour intervals.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
(Required) Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols.
Data interval (minute or hour).
Start date/time for the data range (ISO 8601).
End date/time for the data range (ISO 8601).
Sort order for results.

description.content: Get historical intraday data without split adjustments, spanning 7+ years. Returns OHLCV data at minute or hour intervals.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
(Required) Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols.
Data interval (minute or hour).
Start date/time for the data range (ISO 8601).
End date/time for the data range (ISO 8601).
Sort order for results.

description.content: Get historical end-of-day data for US stocks, adjusted for splits. Supports daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly intervals.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
(Required) Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols.
Data interval.
Start date for the data range.
End date for the data range.
Sort order for results.

description.content: Retrieve historical stock split information for US-listed stocks.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
(Required) Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols.

description.content: Access historical dividend payment records for US-listed stocks.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
(Required) Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols.

description.content: Global financial news with sentiment analysis
Get all the latest global financial news filtered by entities identified within articles, with sentiment analysis for each entity.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Filter news by comma-separated ticker symbols.
Filter by entity types (e.g., index, equity, etf).
Filter by industry classification.
Filter by country code.
Minimum sentiment score filter.
Maximum sentiment score filter.
Full-text search query across article titles and descriptions.
Filter by language code (e.g., en, de, fr).
Page number for pagination.
Number of results per page (max 50).

response.name: News articles returned successfully.

description.content: Find articles similar to a specific article identified by its UUID, with relevance scores and entity data.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Filter similar articles by ticker symbols.
Filter by language code.

response.name: Similar articles returned successfully.

description.content: Retrieve a specific news article by its unique identifier.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.

variable.description: (Required) UUID of the article to retrieve.

response.name: News article returned successfully.

variable.description: (Required) UUID of the article to retrieve.
(Required) UUID of the article to retrieve.
(Required) UUID of the article to retrieve.

description.content: Get an intraday time-series view of entity performance based on news sentiment, grouped by intervals.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Aggregation interval for the time series.
Field to group results by (e.g., symbol).
Filter by comma-separated ticker symbols.
Minimum sentiment score filter.
Minimum number of articles required to include an entity.

response.name: Intraday entity news stats returned successfully.

description.content: Get a single-timeframe aggregation showing best and worst performing entities based on news sentiment.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Field to group results by.
Filter by comma-separated ticker symbols.
Minimum sentiment score filter.
Minimum number of articles required.

response.name: Aggregated entity news stats returned successfully.

description.content: Identify trending entities based on news volume and sentiment within a specified timeframe.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Field to group results by.
Minimum sentiment score filter.
Start date/time for the trending window.
End date/time for the trending window.
Minimum number of articles required.

description.content: View all available news sources that can be used to filter other API requests. Sources span 5,000+ outlets in 30+ languages.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Return only distinct domains.
Filter sources by language code.
Page number for pagination.

description.content: Entity search and metadata
Dynamic search for financial entities (stocks, ETFs, indices, crypto, currencies) with filtering by type, industry, exchange, and country.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.
Search query matching entity name or symbol.
Filter by comma-separated ticker symbols.
Filter by exchange codes.
Filter by entity type (equity, etf, index, etc.).
Filter by industry classification.
Filter by country code.

description.content: Returns all supported entity types including equity, index, ETF, mutual fund, currency, and cryptocurrency.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.

description.content: Retrieve all supported industry classifications for entity filtering.

query.description: (Required) Your API token from the StockData dashboard.

description.content: StockData.org provides free real-time, intraday, and historical stock, forex, and cryptocurrency market data along with global financial news and sentiment analysis. The API delivers market data for US-listed stocks including OHLCV data, splits, dividends, and entity-level news sentiment from 5,000+ sources in 30+ languages. All endpoints require an api_token parameter.
